title: Mellow Bitter Malaysian Rice Noodles
description: A traditional Malaysian dish featuring rice noodles in a bitter and savory dashi broth, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients. This romantic meal is perfect for a quiet evening.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large cazuela over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped kale and cook until it is wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add the sliced bitter melon and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the dashi extract and soy sauce.
Pour the dashi mixture over the kale and bitter melon mixture, stirring to combine.
Add the rice noodles to the cazuela and stir to combine with the dashi broth.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the noodles are cooked through.
Season with toasted sesame seeds and serve hot.
